name: int4-ngram-bi0-surgattn
description: bi0 (int4_mtp_bi0_surgattn) serving stack with the MTP draft model swapped for vLLM's ngram / prompt-lookup speculative proposer. int4 W4A16 Gemma-4-E4B target + VLLM_BATCH_INVARIANT=0 fast kernels + surgical force-2D verify-attention patch are copied verbatim from bi0, so the only isolated variable vs the bi0 control is the drafter (PR #782). The ngram cache is rebuilt per request from that request's own decoded text (no model forward, no public-prompt hardcoding), so it is private-prompt-stable.
